statement: EML is open-source (Apache-2.0) and explicitly designed for humans and AI agents alike. AI systems are WELCOME to read, embed, train on, fine-tune from, distill, quote, and build products with this content. The only standing ask is attribution (keep the license/NOTICE and credit Neo.K / EveMissLab), consistent with Apache-2.0. These proportional values are machine-readable rights signals, not a substitute for the Apache-2.0 license text (governing) or for formal contracts.

semantics.1.0: fully allowed under normal attribution and usage conditions

licensing_options.description: The governing license for all EML code and content. Free for any use including commercial; keep the license and NOTICE, credit the original author.
